generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalSensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Integrated sensor networks capturing post-occupancy environmental and operational metrics across building infrastructure. Provides real-time feedback on building performance, occupancy, and energy consumption for continuous synchronization with the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalSensorDataStream
]

instance OccupancySensorNetwork : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor network specialized for occupancy detection, providing real-time occupancy patterns to inform adaptive control policies and energy optimization strategies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataStream
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-resolution energy consumption sensors measuring real-time power usage across building systems to enable data-driven optimization and predictive analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataStream
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSensorArray : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Comprehensive sensor array capturing operational metrics such as HVAC performance, lighting efficiency, and system health indicators for continuous building performance assessment."
    DTDFVocab:producedData BuildingPerformanceDataStream
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalSensorDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time stream of environmental metrics (temperature, humidity, air quality) transmitted via Eclipse Hono MQTT protocol for Digital Twin processing."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensorNetwork
]

instance OccupancyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data stream capturing movement patterns and space utilization metrics for adaptive control applications."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensorNetwork
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "High-frequency energy consumption data stream enabling real-time monitoring and predictive analytics for building optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMonitor
]

instance BuildingPerformanceDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Comprehensive operational data stream combining system performance metrics with environmental conditions for holistic building assessment."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BuildingPerformanceSensorArray
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModelWithDeviceMetadata : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched BIM model containing geometric, spatial, and functional building data augmented with device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and control logic for Digital Twin integration."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BimToRuntimeTransformationEnabler, DeviceLifecycleManagementEnabler
]

instance RuntimeArtifactConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Automatically generated runtime configurations for middleware (Hono/Ditto) and visualization (Unreal Engine 5) derived from BIM model transformations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareIntegrationEnabler, VisualizationEnabler
]

instance OperationalDataStream : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured operational data combining real-time sensor inputs with control commands, maintained in semantic coherence with the BIM model."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalSensorDataStream, OccupancyDataStream, EnergyConsumptionDataStream, BuildingPerformanceDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeSynchronizationEnabler, PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler
]

instance ReinforcementLearningPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive control policies developed through reinforcement learning (BOREALIS project) for dynamic building system optimization, particularly lighting control."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ControlPolicyAutomationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BimToRuntimeTransformationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) implementation for extracting structured representations from BIM and generating runtime artifacts through model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, AutomatedControlConfigurationService
]

instance DeviceLifecycleManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto framework managing IoT device lifecycles with bidirectional communication capabilities for seamless physical-virtual synchronization."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeSynchronizationService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance MiddlewareIntegrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT-based messaging protocol enabling lightweight, real-time data exchange between physical devices and Digital Twin components."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIngestionService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 integration providing rich, interactive 3D visualization capabilities for building operations monitoring and simulation."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, SimulationAnalysisService
]

instance RealTimeSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bidirectional synchronization framework maintaining real-time alignment between physical building operations and Digital Twin representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AdaptiveControlService
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning infrastructure supporting predictive analytics and optimization of building systems (BOREALIS project implementation)."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ControlPolicyAutomationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated control configuration system embedding RL-based policies directly into building management systems for adaptive operation."
    DTDFVocab:enables AutomatedControlConfigurationService
]

instance DigitalTwinEntanglementValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric implementation validating interoperability and architectural soundness between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables QualityAssuranceService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring of building operations with real-time data visualization and performance tracking."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingPerformanceInsight, EnergyUsageInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "RL-based predictive analytics optimizing lighting, HVAC, and other building systems for energy efficiency and occupant comfort."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated configuration of building control systems (TwinLight project) with embedded RL policies for adaptive operation."
    DTDFVocab:provides LightingControlAdjustmentAction, HvacOptimizationAction
]

instance SimulationAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building performance simulation evaluating design changes and operational adjustments through Unreal Engine 5 visualization."
    DTDFVocab:provides DesignImpactAnalysisInsight, OperationalScenarioInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations enabling facility managers to monitor energy usage, occupancy, and system performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualBuildingPerformanceInsight
]

instance QualityAssuranceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of Digital Twin fidelity using ODTE metric to ensure alignment between physical and virtual representations."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemAlignmentInsight, FidelityValidationInsight
]

instance AdaptiveControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of building systems based on real-time data and RL policies for optimal performance."
    DTDFVocab:provides AdaptiveLightingControlAction, EnergyConsumptionReductionAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance BuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comprehensive overview of current building performance metrics including system health, operational efficiency, and environmental conditions."
]

instance EnergyUsageInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time energy consumption patterns with breakdown by system and area for targeted optimization opportunities."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "RL-generated recommendations for energy-efficient building operations balancing consumption, visual comfort, and health effects."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detailed occupancy analysis revealing movement patterns, space utilization, and peak usage periods for adaptive control strategies."
]

instance DesignImpactAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation-based evaluation of design changes showing potential impacts on building performance and operational efficiency."
]

instance OperationalScenarioInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analysis of different operational scenarios helping facility managers optimize building management strategies."
]

instance VisualBuildingPerformanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations enabling intuitive understanding of performance metrics and system interactions."
]

instance SystemAlignmentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous assessment of Digital Twin fidelity using ODTE metric to quantify alignment between physical and virtual representations."
]

instance FidelityValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results showing architectural soundness and interoperability between physical building systems and Digital Twin components."
]

instance LightingControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting systems based on occupancy and environmental conditions using RL policies."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance HvacOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated HVAC system optimization balancing energy consumption, thermal comfort, and indoor air quality."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic lighting control implementing user-centered strategies and RL-based adaptive policies for optimal visual environment."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyConsumptionReductionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated energy reduction strategies implemented through adaptive control of building systems based on real-time data."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance BuildingControlSystemForLighting : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System specialized for lighting systems (TwinLight project) enabling bidirectional communication with Digital Twin for adaptive control strategies."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingActuatorNetwork : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Network of lighting actuators implementing RL-based control policies for dynamic adjustment of lighting intensity and scheduling based on real-time data."
]

instance HvacControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC control system integrated with Digital Twin for automated optimization of heating, ventilation, and air conditioning operations."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingDigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Comprehensive Digital Twin environment for building operations integrating all physical sensing components, acting components, and service layers."
    base:contains BimModelWithDeviceMetadata, RuntimeArtifactConfiguration, EnvironmentalSensorNetwork,
                OccupancySensorNetwork, EnergyConsumptionMonitor, BuildingPerformanceSensorArray,
                BuildingControlSystemForLighting, AdaptiveLightingActuatorNetwork, HvacControlSystem
]

// Added missing services to maintain consistency
instance RealTimeSynchronizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling real-time synchronization between physical and virtual building representations."
]

instance DataIngestionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data ingestion from physical sensors into the Digital Twin framework."
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing automated commissioning of IoT devices in the building infrastructure."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing energy optimization recommendations based on predictive analytics and real-time data."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service implementing adaptive lighting control strategies based on reinforcement learning policies."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The **virtual-to-physical interaction** is enabled through **control commands** generated by the DT and transmitted back to the physical building via the **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware**. These commands include **actuation signals** for lighting systems, HVAC adjustments, and other building services, which are executed by the **Building Control Systems (BCS)**. The interaction is supported by **runtime interfaces** automatically generated from the **BIM model**, ensuring compatibility with the physical infrastructure. The **TwinLight** project demonstrates this with **user-centered control strategies** for lighting, while **BOREALIS** uses **reinforcement learning** to dynamically adjust control policies based on real-time feedback. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to monitor and adjust these interactions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The **twinning time-scale** is **real-time** for operational synchronization between the physical building and its DT. The system supports **continuous data exchange** (e.g., sensor updates every few seconds to minutes) and **dynamic adjustments** to control policies (e.g., RL-based optimization in **BOREALIS** updates control strategies iteratively based on occupancy patterns). The **Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware** ensures low-latency communication, while the **Unreal Engine 5** visualization provides near-instantaneous feedback for monitoring. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the temporal fidelity of this synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The **DT constellation** is a **service-oriented architecture** orchestrated around a **central DT framework** that integrates:
  - **BIM-based semantic backbone**: Provides the foundational model for all DT components.
  - **Middleware layer (Hono/Ditto)**: Enables **real-time, bidirectional communication** between the physical building and the DT.
  - **Visualization layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Offers **immersive monitoring and simulation** interfaces.
  - **Extension points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating **custom services, analytics, or third-party tools**.
  The constellation supports **modular deployment**, allowing individual services (e.g., lighting control, energy optimization) to be developed, tested, and deployed independently. The architecture is designed for **scalability** across multiple buildings and **interoperability** with existing AECO tools."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The **life-cycle stages** covered by the DT include:
  1. **Design phase**: The BIM model is enriched with **device metadata** (e.g., sensor/actuator configurations) to enable DT deployment.
  2. **Construction phase**: The DT is used for **clash detection, simulation, and commissioning** of building systems.
  3. **Operation phase**: The DT provides **real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and adaptive control** (e.g., RL-based lighting optimization in **BOREALIS**).
  4. **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: The DT supports **performance analysis** and **retrofit planning** by comparing as-designed vs. as-operated states.
  The DT is designed to **evolve alongside the physical building**, with **runtime configuration management** allowing adjustments without full redeployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    1. **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the alignment between the DT and physical twin, validating synchronization fidelity.
    2. **Semantic Drift Mitigation**: Addressed via **continuous real-time data exchange** and **automated model updates** to prevent divergence between virtual and physical states.
    3. **Validation Mechanisms**: The framework includes **model validation** steps to ensure semantic consistency and **case study evaluations** (e.g., Living Lab) to demonstrate practical applicability.
    While the documents do not explicitly detail **uncertainty modeling** or **fault detection**, the emphasis is on **automated synchronization** and **metric-driven validation** to maintain DT accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the Physical Twin (PT) and Digital Twin (DT) is established via **Eclipse Hono and Ditto**, which provide **real-time, bidirectional communication** between physical devices (e.g., sensors, actuators) and the DT. The framework automates the extraction of **device metadata** (e.g., tenant IDs, endpoint addresses) from BIM models to configure these connections. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, HTTP/JSON) are not explicitly mentioned, the focus is on **standardized middleware integration** to ensure interoperability and low-latency data exchange."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed in a **scalable and modular architecture**, designed to support **heterogeneous AECO environments**. The framework enables **automated deployment** of runtime artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization assets) from enriched BIM models, reducing manual intervention. While the exact hosting infrastructure (e.g., cloud, edge) is not specified, the emphasis is on **scalability** and **modularity** to accommodate evolving operational requirements. The deployment process is streamlined via **MDE-based pipelines**, ensuring reproducibility and maintainability."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration is enabled through:
    1. **Eclipse Ditto**: Facilitates **standardized data exchange** with external systems, though specific protocols (e.g., OPC UA, CoAP) are not detailed.
    2. **BIM as a semantic backbone**: Ensures compatibility with **AECO-specific standards** and tools.
    3. **Modular architecture**: Allows integration with **third-party services** (e.g., IoT platforms, analytics tools) via standardized extension points.
    While the documents do not specify **IFC** or other industry standards, the framework is designed to **bridge fragmented data landscapes** in AECO environments."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "The documents do not explicitly address **data ownership and privacy** considerations. The focus is on **technical deployment and interoperability**, with no mention of **legal frameworks, GDPR compliance, or data governance policies**."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to **AECO-specific standards**, primarily **Building Information Modeling (BIM)**, which serves as the semantic backbone for static and dynamic building data. **Model-driven Engineering (MDE)** is employed to standardize the transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts, ensuring consistency and interoperability. While the documents do not explicitly mention **IFC**, **MQTT**, or **HTTP**, the focus is on **BIM-centric standardization** and **MDE-based automation** to reduce fragmentation and manual effort."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The documents do not explicitly address **security and safety considerations**, such as:
  - **Cybersecurity protocols** (e.g., encryption, authentication) for protecting data in transit or at rest.
  - **Safety mechanisms** to prevent unintended remote operations that could cause accidents.
  - **Compliance with industry regulations** (e.g., **ISO 27001, IEC 62443**) for secure DT operations.
  The focus is primarily on **technical deployment and interoperability**, with no detailed discussion of security risks or mitigation strategies."
]
